name: Feature request
about: A new skill, task template, or data integration
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the local SEO workflow this would improve. Be specific: "GBP review response drafting for multi-location brands" beats "better reviews".

## Proposed skill or change

- Skill name (if new):
- Scope (what it handles, what it explicitly doesn't):
- Trigger phrases that should activate it:
- Data sources required (MCP servers, APIs):

## Example usage

Show the prompt a practitioner would give the agent, and the output they'd expect.

```
> audit Mike's Plumbing in Buffalo for citation gaps

agent output...
```

## Alternatives considered

Is there an existing skill or workflow that almost covers this? Why isn't it enough?

## Willing to contribute

- [ ] I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] Just raising the idea
